conclusion: C8 has the strongest positive scaling evidence so far: aggregate_vs_c1=1.354 and aggregate/per-request_vs_serial_bridge=1.622. It is still not retainable because profiler evidence is absent and the retained gate reports row-chunk full-attention blockers/throughput_claim_eligible=false. Fixing or accepting the row-chunk correctness workaround plus profiler evidence is required before any benchmark rollup update.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: current-commit c8 serial-bridge baseline was refreshed and attached to correctness-green c8 retained run with primitive evidence. Scaling.complete=true and aggregate/per-request ratios vs serial bridge are 1.622, but retained remains blocked by missing profiler and full-attention/native path blockers, so no performance claim.
